title: Legendary BANG
description: The best Minecraft 1.20.1 survival modpack for every Zelda fanboy !
body:
Big modpack that adds content on all points

- Exploration:
  - Structure
  - Dungeon
- Combat: Roll/Dodge
- Weapon:
  - Grappling Hook
  - Magic Staff
  - Bomb Flowers
- Decoration
- Mechanics
- Graphics
- Sheader
- Texture Pack (Already configured, you have nothing to do)
- FPS
- OST (Music to download separately, there was no more room to put them directly in the modpack)

Put OST in resourcepacks folder, no need to change Minecraft settings. Downloaded [here](https://mega.nz/file/SUc0FBxA#sKUhwvSjz4d9nM5P7vvjZXzT1OJ8jMgAjdt9IAuKK44) 

In short, you are a fan of Minecraft and especially Zelda, this modpack is made for you! Bring your friends to a server and go on an adventure!

Thanks to the creators of "The Legend of Steve", this modpack would not exist without this mode
